title: Is this AI? Will it look cheap?
body: GeoLocally uses a streamlined production process to keep the starting price at $499 instead of $5,000. Every video is reviewed by a human, uses a natural-sounding voiceover, and gets redone if the final result feels off.

title: Do I really need to care about AEO?
body: Only in one sense: more people are asking full questions in search. The practical fix is still simple. Make your business clearer online so Google and newer search tools can understand it faster.

title: What if I already have a website?
body: That’s fine — keep it. Your GeoLocally page works alongside your existing site as a focused landing page built around one service promise, one local footprint, and one clear next step.

title: How fast will I see results?
body: GeoLocally usually replies within 1 business day. After kickoff, a first draft is typically ready in 3-5 business days. Search visibility still depends on competition, reviews, and the rest of your online presence.
